questions.title: PII for Banking data governance program
questions.problem_statement: Design, implement, test, or whiteboard a hard solution involving PII for Banking data governance program. Explain assumptions, edge cases, validation strategy, quality risks, evidence expected, complexity, and production-readiness considerations.
solution_outline: Clarify expected input/output and business meaning.
Identify failure modes and data/automation risks.
Propose a simple baseline approach.
Optimize for deterministic behavior, maintainability, and observability.
Add unit/API/SQL/UI tests depending on the skill category.
Capture terminal or CI evidence.
Explain time/space complexity or operational complexity.
Map the concept to an enterprise project scenario.
